zh.lifeSummary: Betyn Norris是Sir John Norris of Pen-llino的女兒，於1210年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。她和Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon至少有9個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: Norris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

variants.name: Nurse
meanings: from Middle English norice, nurice ‘nurse; foster parent’ (Old French norrice, nurrice).

nameMeanings.name: Betyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, a local name from either of two places in Northumberland named with Old English bēan ‘beans’ (a collective singular) or beonet ‘bent grass’ + tūn ‘settlement, enclosure’.

variants.name: Beeton
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, a local name from either of two places in Northumberland named with Old English bēan ‘beans’ (a collective singular) or beonet ‘bent grass’ + tūn ‘settlement, enclosure’.

en.lifeSummary: Betyn Norris was born in 1210, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir John Norris of Pen-llino. She had at least 9 sons with Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon.

ja.lifeSummary: Betyn Norrisは1210年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでSir John Norris of Pen-llinoの娘として生まれた。彼女はHywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgonとの間に少なくとも9人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Betyn Norris(은)는 1210년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Sir John Norris of Pen-llino의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다.
